text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem cs-ems-acquisition-lane

This case-sensitive code system https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/CodeSystem/cs-ems-acquisition-lane defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
hie-fhir Hospital/HIE US Core FHIR endpointScoped FHIR queries (request-time minimum necessary).
ccd-document USCDI v3 C-CDA document exchangeCCD/discharge summary retrieval; minimum necessary enforced at ingestion.
payer-provider-access Payer Provider Access APICMS-0057-F claims + USCDI data (effective 2027-01-01).
registry Registry / state linkageCARES, trauma/stroke registries, state hospital-linkage programs.

name: EMSAcquisitionLane
title: EMS Outcome Acquisition Lane
description: The acquisition channel through which externally-sourced eOutcome data was obtained: granular FHIR queries against a hospital/HIE US Core endpoint, USCDI v3 C-CDA document exchange, a payer Provider Access API (CMS-0057-F), or registry/state linkage.

concept.definition: CCD/discharge summary retrieval; minimum necessary enforced at ingestion.
CARES, trauma/stroke registries, state hospital-linkage programs.
